---
title: "French Towns Lakehouse"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
---

French Towns Lakehouse is a personal data engineering project that builds a
self-hosted medallion-architecture lakehouse for all 35,000+ French communes.
Data flows from open government APIs and web scrapers through DuckDB + dbt
transformations into queryable Parquet files on MinIO , orchestrated with Prefect.

This blog covers the engineering decisions, data modeling choices, and analytical
insights discovered along the way.
